channel.title: FTNT — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on FTNT (Fortinet) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: NEW POSITION FTNT · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) new position FTNT in Q4 2025 · 2.8% of portfolio. New Fortinet cybersecurity position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stephen Mandel)
